name: Angel Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites until foamy.
2. Add 1 cup sugar a little at a time, beating after each addition.
3. Add 1 teaspoon vanilla. Continue beating until the mixture holds soft peaks.
4. Mix cracker crumbs and 1 cup pecans.
5. Fold into meringue mixture a little at a time.
6. Spoon mixture into an 8-inch pie plate to form a shell.
7. Pull up mixture into peaks around the edge of the plate with the back of a spoon.
8. Spread evenly.
9. Bake in a moderate oven, 350°F, for 30 minutes.
10. Cool thoroughly on a wire cake rack.
11. Mix cream, 2 tablespoons sugar, 1 teaspoon vanilla and almond flavoring. Whip until thick and shiny.
12. Spoon into cold pie shell.
13. Sprinkle remaining 1/2 cup chopped pecans around the edge of the cream.
14. Using a sharp knife, cut like a pie.
Makes 6 - 8 servings
Note: This recipe is from Mama's Favorite Recipes (Frances Turfitt), shared by Nancy Coleman.
